proof: function[T0: Monoid](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { is_mul_congruence[T0](x0) = is_monoid_congruence[T0](x0) }[M](kernel_relation[M, N](f.hom))
function[T0: AddMonoid, T1: AddMonoid](x0: AddMonoidHom[T0, T1]) { lib(add_monoid).is_add_monoid_hom[T0, T1](x0.hom) }[A, B](f)
function[T0: AddMonoid](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { is_add_congruence[T0](x0) = is_add_monoid_congruence[T0](x0) }[A](kernel_relation[A, B](f.hom))

goal: is_add_group_congruence[M](kernel_relation[M, N](f)) and forall(x0: R) { respects_unary_op[M](kernel_relation[M, N](f), src.smul(x0)) }
proof: not forall(x1: R) { respects_unary_op[M](kernel_relation[M, N](f), src.smul(x1)) }

function[T0: AddCommGroup, T2: Ring](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: Module[T2, T0]) { (is_add_group_congruence[T0](x0) and forall(x2: T2) { respects_unary_op[T0](x0, x1.smul(x2)) }) = is_module_congruence[T2, T0](x1, x0) }[M, R](kernel_relation[M, N](f), src)
is_add_group_congruence[M](kernel_relation[M, N](f)) and forall(x0: R) { respects_unary_op[M](kernel_relation[M, N](f), src.smul(x0)) }
